baseline.observed: CLI rejected unknown source ids, but run_scan accepted source_ids: Some(["missing-source"]) and returned an empty successful scan with a warning.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because run_scan returned Ok with warnings instead of an error.

selected_candidate.name: API source id validation
selected_candidate.reason: Align the run_scan API boundary with CLI source id validation.
selected_candidate.success_metric: run_scan returns an error for unknown source ids, the existing selection helper behavior remains covered, and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
The new guard runs before source traversal.
Unknown id ordering is stable through BTreeSet collection.
Focused API, helper, and CLI source-id tests were rerun.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
